title: Don't miss MosJazz in November
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - In November 2024, the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - In November 2024, the sixth MosJazz Music Festival will take place in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - In November 2024, the sixth MosJazz Music Festival will take place in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The MosJazz Festival is an annual musical event, held at Santos Beach. The event combines the finest of the outdoor, camping lifestyle, with a world class entertainment production.","html":"The MosJazz Festival is an annual musical event, held at Santos Beach. The event combines the finest of the outdoor, camping lifestyle, with a world class entertainment production."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Camping sites for the event are available at the De Bakke Santos Resort."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"With over 20 local and international acts expected in 2024, this annual event is fast on its way to becoming one of the biggest annual jazz music events held on a beach in Africa,\" said event producer Clarence Ford.","html":"\"With over 20 local and international acts expected in 2024, this annual event is fast on its way to becoming one of the biggest annual jazz music events held on a beach in Africa,\" said event producer Clarence Ford."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See more photos here: MossJazz Festival launch","html":"See more photos here: MossJazz Festival launch"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2023 MosJazz Festival included South African acts such as Emo Adams, Garth Taylor and Ramon Alexander, as well as international acts Phil Fearon & Galaxy and Andrew Young (UK), Choko Caribbean Vibes (Trinidad & Tobago), Judy Boucher (Bahamas), and Afro Fiesta (Angola, Congo and Mozambique) among many others.","html":"The 2023 MosJazz Festival included South African acts such as Emo Adams, Garth Taylor and Ramon Alexander, as well as international acts Phil Fearon & Galaxy and Andrew Young (UK), Choko Caribbean Vibes (Trinidad & Tobago), Judy Boucher (Bahamas), and Afro Fiesta (Angola, Congo and Mozambique) among many others."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MosJazz is from 28 November to 1 December.","html":"MosJazz is from 28 November to 1 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
